sections_cited: Sections 9 and 10 of the National Accountability Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. B. A. No. D – 260 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.5358/2021 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on MA No.5359/2021 4. For hearing of bail application 29.12.2021 Mr. Ashok Kumar K. Jamba Advocate along with Applicant..................... Through this application, applicant Qambar Ali son of Muhammad Jurial Kalari seeks protective pre-arrest bail in Reference No.04/2020 Re: State v. Syed Asghar Ali Shah and others, under Sections 9 and 10 of the National Accountability Ordinance, 1999. Learned counsel submits that Applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in the Reference; that as per order of the Hon'ble Supreme Court, the Applicant was ready to furnish surety but due to illness / Covid-19 could not do so and the learned trial Court has issued NBWs against him. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case, Applicant / accused is admitted to protective bail for a period of 05 (Five) days from today in Reference No.04/2020 Re: State v. Syed Asghar Ali Shah and others, under Sections 9 and 10 of the National Accountability Ordinance, 1999, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Fifty Thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meantime, operation of NBW, issued by the trial Court against the Applicant in the above Reference, shall remain suspended for the above period. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days from today or when the applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier.

In the meantime, operation of NBW, issued by the trial Court against the Applicant in the above Reference, shall remain suspended for the above period. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of five days from today or when the applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever occurs earlier. This Bail Application stands disposed of accordingly with pending applications. __________________ J U D G E __________________ J U D G E Crl. Bail Application No.D-260/2021 2 Ahmad
